title: BenchmarkBaselineUpdated payload
description: Emitted by measure.bench_run when called with update_baseline=true. Records the explicit baseline overwrite separately from the routine BenchmarkDiff so the events ledger has a first-class audit trail for 'this is when the baseline shifted'. Composite with BenchmarkDiff: a single update_baseline=true call emits both events in one transaction (BenchmarkBaselineUpdated first, then BenchmarkDiff with baseline_updated=true). T1 design audit added this as the 9th event type beyond the chain's original 8.

baseline_json_path.description: Repo-relative path to the baseline file that was overwritten.

previous_baseline_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 of the baseline file content BEFORE overwrite. Set when the file existed; absent when this was a first-time baseline write.

new_baseline_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the baseline file content AFTER overwrite. Pairs with previous_baseline_sha256 for round-trip auditability.
